action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline mae_60min = 5.0671 with tiny STGCN (hidden 32, blocks 2). Training 10 epochs took 89s. Analysis: Model is very small, no activation after GCN, no residuals, no dropout. Increasing capacity and adding these components should improve performance. Remaining time ~2.95h allows longer training and larger models. Decision: Scale up model (hidden=64, spatial=32, blocks=3), add ReLU after GCN, add residual connections, add dropout 0.1, increase batch_size to 64, train 15 epochs, submit eval.
